name: Load Robot Cell From URDF/SRDF
description: Load a RobotCell from URDF + SRDF files on disk. Optionally points at a local mesh package folder for geometry. No ROS required. Tools and rigid bodies wired into `tools`/`rigid_bodies` are registered into the cell in one go, so no separate Add* + set_robot_cell() step is needed.

inputParameters.name: urdf_filename
inputParameters.description: Absolute path to the URDF file.

inputParameters.name: srdf_filename
inputParameters.description: Absolute path to the SRDF file.

inputParameters.name: local_package_mesh_folder
inputParameters.description: Optional path to a local package folder holding the meshes referenced as `package://` in the URDF. Required for visualization.

inputParameters.name: reload
inputParameters.description: Force a reload (bypass cache). Defaults to False.

inputParameters.name: tools
inputParameters.description: Optional list of ToolModels to register into the cell. Each is keyed by its `.name`.

inputParameters.name: rigid_bodies
inputParameters.description: Optional list of RigidBodies to register into the cell. Each is keyed by its `.name` (set it on the Rigid Body From… component).
